title: Geo-Wallet Push
goal: We are introducing a new CRM capability that enables us to send location-based push notifications through Wallet passes, even to users who do not have the app installed. This enhancement significantly broadens our mobile communication reach, allowing us to engage with a wider audience directly on their devices through Wallet.
description: This feature leverages geolocation triggers to deliver relevant and timely messages when users are near specific points of interest. It opens a new channel for mobile engagement, complementing existing app-based communications and helping us reach customers who have not yet opted into the app ecosystem. With this rollout, Wallet pass holders can now receive two types of push notifications based on their location. These messages are delivered directly through Wallet, without requiring the user to download or open the app. Additional languages and message variations will be planned and coordinated as part of the next steps.
